reasoning: The control SI-4 (23) focuses on system monitoring and host-based device security, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through audit logging and security monitoring mechanisms. Kubernetes audit logging can be enabled to monitor API server activities, similar to cloud security monitoring services. Ensuring audit log integrity is akin to log file validation in cloud services. Pod security monitoring can be achieved by enabling security context settings and using admission controllers to enforce security policies.
title: System Monitoring | Host-based Devices
